ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "account_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's loyalty program membership */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" TEXT /* Reference to the customer's account */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative who handled the transaction */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  "difference" TEXT /* Difference after applying the discount */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES customers ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the representative works */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the sales representative */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Hire date of the sales representative */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales representative's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales representative's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the store's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discount applied to the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction item record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_items_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage value of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of the discount */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the discount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the discount record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_discounts" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discount applied */,
  "applied_by" TEXT /* Reference to the sales representative or system that applied the discount */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction discount record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction discount record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id", "discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loyalty program record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
